caption: A man wearing a white shirt speaks into multiple microphones held by reporters during an outdoor press conference. He is surrounded by other men, some in white shirts and some in dark suits. The scene is framed by a news broadcast layout from "NEWS 18 इंडिया". A red banner at the top reads "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'", and a blue banner at the bottom displays the text "जे. पी. नड्डा: नीतीश का वापस आना सुखद समाचार है". The screen features several small inset portrait photos of political figures with their names, such as "संतोष सुमन", "सुमित कुमार", "डॉ. प्रेम कुमार", and "विजय चौधरी". In the bottom two frames, the text "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?" appears in a yellow and red banner. The timestamp "10:02 PM" is visible in the bottom right corner of each frame. The composition of the crowd remains consistent across the frames as the speaker continues talking.
